raw_sql:
SELECT 
    department,
    COUNT(*) AS total_expenses,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at))/3600)::numeric, 2) AS avg_processing_hours,
    ROUND(MIN(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at))/3600)::numeric, 2) AS min_hours,
    ROUND(MAX(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at))/3600)::numeric, 2) AS max_hours,
    ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at))/3600)::numeric, 2) AS median_hours
FROM flag_24
WHERE processed_date IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY department
ORDER BY avg_processing_hours ASC;
template:
SELECT 
    department,
    COUNT(*) AS total_expenses,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at))/?n)::numeric, ?n) AS avg_processing_hours,
    ROUND(MIN(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at))/?n)::numeric, ?n) AS min_hours,
    ROUND(MAX(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at))/?n)::numeric, ?n) AS max_hours,
    ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(?n) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at))/?n)::numeric, ?n) AS median_hours
FROM flag_24
WHERE processed_date IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY department
ORDER BY avg_processing_hours ASC;

predicates: ((processed_date IS NOT NULL) AND (opened_at IS NOT NULL))

GROUP BY category
ORDER BY avg_hours ASC;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    department,
    COUNT(DISTINCT "user") AS unique_users,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ci) AS unique_ci,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN source_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) AS has_source_id,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN type IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) AS has_type,
    ROUND(AVG(amount)::numeric, 2) AS avg_amount
FROM flag_24
WHERE processed_date IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY department
ORDER BY AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at))/3600) ASC;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    department,
    "user",
    COUNT(*) AS expense_count,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at))/3600)::numeric, 2) AS avg_hours,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM processed_date) = 0 AND EXTRACT(SECOND FROM processed_date) = 0 THEN 1 END) AS exact_hour_timestamps,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) % 3600 = 0 THEN 1 END) AS exact_hour_intervals
FROM flag_24
WHERE processed_date IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY department, "user"
ORDER BY avg_hours ASC;
template:

    department,
    "user",
    COUNT(*) AS expense_count,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at))/?n)::numeric, ?n) AS avg_hours,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM processed_date) = ?n AND EXTRACT(SECOND FROM processed_date) = ?n THEN ?n END) AS exact_hour_timestamps,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) % ?n = ?n THEN ?n END) AS exact_hour_intervals
FROM flag_24
WHERE processed_date IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY department, "user"
ORDER BY avg_hours ASC;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    department,
    CASE WHEN EXTRACT(DOW FROM opened_at) IN (0, 6) THEN 'weekend' ELSE 'weekday' END AS submission_type,
    COUNT(*) AS count,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at))/3600)::numeric, 2) AS avg_hours,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) % 3600 = 0 THEN 1 END) AS exact_hour_count
FROM flag_24
WHERE processed_date IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY department, submission_type
ORDER BY department, submission_type;
template:
SELECT 
    department,
    CASE WHEN EXTRACT(DOW FROM opened_at) IN (?n, ?n) THEN ?s ELSE ?s END AS submission_type,
    COUNT(*) AS count,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at))/?n)::numeric, ?n) AS avg_hours,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) % ?n = ?n THEN ?n END) AS exact_hour_count
FROM flag_24
WHERE processed_date IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY department, submission_type
ORDER BY department, submission_type;

GROUP BY department, description_type
ORDER BY department, description_type;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    EXTRACT(HOUR FROM opened_at) AS open_hour,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at))/3600 AS processing_hours,
    amount,
    category,
    "user",
    CASE WHEN EXTRACT(HOUR FROM opened_at) BETWEEN 8 AND 17 THEN 'business_hours' ELSE 'off_hours' END AS time_type
FROM flag_24
WHERE department = 'Development'
  AND processed_date IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY processing_hours, open_hour;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at))/3600 AS processing_hours,
    EXTRACT(DOW FROM opened_at) AS dow,
    amount,
    CASE 
        WHEN amount < 2000 THEN 'under_2k'
        WHEN amount < 5000 THEN '2k_to_5k'
        ELSE 'over_5k'
    END AS amount_tier,
    category,
    number,
    state
FROM flag_24
WHERE department = 'Development'
  AND processed_date IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY processing_hours, amount;
template:
SELECT 
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at))/?n AS processing_hours,
    EXTRACT(DOW FROM opened_at) AS dow,
    amount,
    CASE 
        WHEN amount < ?n THEN ?s
        WHEN amount < ?n THEN ?s
        ELSE ?s
    END AS amount_tier,
    category,
    number,
    state
FROM flag_24
WHERE department = ?s
  AND processed_date IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY processing_hours, amount;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    DATE(opened_at) AS submission_date,
    COUNT(*) AS submissions_that_day,
    STRING_AGG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at))/3600 || 'h', ', ' ORDER BY opened_at) AS processing_hours,
    STRING_AGG(amount::text, ', ' ORDER BY opened_at) AS amounts,
    EXTRACT(DOW FROM DATE(opened_at)) AS dow
FROM flag_24
WHERE department = 'Development'
  AND processed_date IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY DATE(opened_at), EXTRACT(DOW FROM DATE(opened_at))
ORDER BY submission_date;
template:

FROM flag_24

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    DATE(opened_at) AS date,
    TO_CHAR(opened_at, 'Day') AS day_name,
    EXTRACT(DOW FROM opened_at) AS dow,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at))/3600 AS processing_hours,

FROM flag_24

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at))/3600 AS processing_hours,
    ci,
    category,
    amount,
    EXTRACT(DOW FROM opened_at) AS dow,
    "user",
    CASE 
        WHEN ci ILIKE '%Dell%' OR ci ILIKE '%HP%' OR ci ILIKE '%Lenovo%' THEN 'branded_hardware'
        WHEN ci ILIKE '%Service%' OR ci ILIKE '%VPN%' OR ci ILIKE '%Cloud%' OR ci ILIKE '%AWS%' THEN 'service'
        ELSE 'other'
    END AS ci_type
FROM flag_24
WHERE department = 'Development'
  AND processed_date IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY processing_hours, ci_type;
template:
SELECT 
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at))/?n AS processing_hours,
    ci,
    category,
    amount,
    EXTRACT(DOW FROM opened_at) AS dow,
    "user",
    CASE 
        WHEN ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s THEN ?s
        WHEN ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s THEN ?s
        ELSE ?s
    END AS ci_type
FROM flag_24
WHERE department = ?s
  AND processed_date IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY processing_hours, ci_type;

predicates: ((processed_date IS NOT NULL) AND (opened_at IS NOT NULL) AND (department = 'Development'::text))

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    department,
    CASE 
        WHEN ci ILIKE '%Latitude%' OR ci ILIKE '%Spectre%' OR ci ILIKE '%Elitebook%' OR ci ILIKE '%Ideapad%' OR ci ILIKE '%laptop%' OR ci ILIKE '%notebook%' THEN 'laptop'
        WHEN ci ILIKE '%Dell%' OR ci ILIKE '%HP%' OR ci ILIKE '%Lenovo%' OR ci ILIKE '%server%' OR ci ILIKE '%rack%' OR ci ILIKE '%workstation%' OR ci ILIKE '%optiplex%' THEN 'other_hardware'
        ELSE 'non_hardware'
    END AS asset_class,
    COUNT(*) AS count,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at))/3600)::numeric, 2) AS avg_hours,
    ROUND(AVG(amount)::numeric, 0) AS avg_amount
FROM flag_24
WHERE processed_date IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY department, asset_class
ORDER BY department, avg_hours;
template:
SELECT 
    department,
    CASE 
        WHEN ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s THEN ?s
        WHEN ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s OR ci ILIKE ?s THEN ?s
        ELSE ?s
    END AS asset_class,
    COUNT(*) AS count,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at))/?n)::numeric, ?n) AS avg_hours,
    ROUND(AVG(amount)::numeric, ?n) AS avg_amount
FROM flag_24
WHERE processed_date IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY department, asset_class
ORDER BY department, avg_hours;

groupby_keys: CASE WHEN ((ci ~~* '%Latitude%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%Spectre%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%Elitebook%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%Ideapad%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%laptop%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%notebook%'::text)) THEN 'laptop'::text WHEN ((ci ~~* '%Dell%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%HP%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%Lenovo%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%server%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%rack%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%workstation%'::text) OR (ci ~~* '%optiplex%'::text)) THEN 'other_hardware'::text ELSE 'non_hardware'::text END

predicates: ((processed_date IS NOT NULL) AND (opened_at IS NOT NULL))

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    department,
    COUNT(*) AS total_expenses,
    COUNT(DISTINCT "user") AS unique_submitters,
    ROUND(COUNT(*)::numeric / COUNT(DISTINCT "user"), 1) AS expenses_per_user,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at))/3600)::numeric, 2) AS avg_processing_hours,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) % 3600 = 0 THEN 1 END) AS exact_hour_count,
    ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) % 3600 = 0 THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct_exact_hour
FROM flag_24
WHERE processed_date IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY department
ORDER BY avg_processing_hours ASC;
template:
SELECT 
    department,
    COUNT(*) AS total_expenses,
    COUNT(DISTINCT "user") AS unique_submitters,
    ROUND(COUNT(*)::numeric / COUNT(DISTINCT "user"), ?n) AS expenses_per_user,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at))/?n)::numeric, ?n) AS avg_processing_hours,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) % ?n = ?n THEN ?n END) AS exact_hour_count,
    ROUND(?n * COUNT(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) % ?n = ?n THEN ?n END) / COUNT(*), ?n) AS pct_exact_hour
FROM flag_24
WHERE processed_date IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY department
ORDER BY avg_processing_hours ASC;

predicates: ((processed_date IS NOT NULL) AND (opened_at IS NOT NULL))

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    department,
    number,
    amount,
    category,
    opened_at,
    processed_date,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at))/3600 AS processing_hours,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at)) % 3600 = 0 AS exact_hour,
    "user"
FROM flag_24
WHERE department IN ('Development', 'Finance')
  AND processed_date IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY department, number;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    department,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM opened_at))::numeric, 1) AS avg_open_minute,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM opened_at) = 0 AND EXTRACT(SECOND FROM opened_at) = 0 THEN 1 END) AS round_hour_opens,
    COUNT(*) AS total,
    ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM opened_at) = 0 AND EXTRACT(SECOND FROM opened_at) = 0 THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct_round_open,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at))/3600)::numeric, 2) AS avg_processing_hours
FROM flag_24
WHERE processed_date IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY department
ORDER BY avg_processing_hours ASC;

    COUNT(*) AS total,
    ROUND(?n * COUNT(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM opened_at) = ?n AND EXTRACT(SECOND FROM opened_at) = ?n THEN ?n END) / COUNT(*), ?n) AS pct_round_open,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at))/?n)::numeric, ?n) AS avg_processing_hours

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    department,
    EXTRACT(HOUR FROM processed_date) AS processed_hour,
    COUNT(*) AS count,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_date - opened_at))/3600)::numeric, 2) AS avg_processing_hours
FROM flag_24
WHERE department = 'Development'
  AND processed_date IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY department, processed_hour
ORDER BY processed_hour;

  AND processed_date IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
